reasoning: The Lean statement is a faithful encoding. `CofiniteTopology X` in Mathlib (Topology/Constructions.lean) is exactly the finite complement topology: its open sets are `∅` or sets with finite complement. The typeclass `[Infinite X]` matches "X is an infinite set". The conclusion `IsConnected (Set.univ : Set (CofiniteTopology X))` is the standard idiom for "the space is connected": since `IsConnected s := s.Nonempty ∧ IsPreconnected s`, this asserts the whole space is nonempty (automatic from `Infinite`) and preconnected, which is equivalent to `ConnectedSpace (CofiniteTopology X)`. No hypotheses are added or dropped relative to the informal claim.
